content.en:
The iris shuttles through the timeline, and countless images cross it all around, all of which are images of the future.

In an instant, they traveled hundreds of millions of eternal years.

And every time I move forward, I see a different timeline scene, but from beginning to end, the ancient tree of time and space is there, as if the eternal and immortal god is established between the past and the future, and there is no change.

"It's not going to go on like this, it's hard to get anything out, we have to turn around and move on to the past. "

The Ice Lord said.

"To the past?"

Many Legendary Realm Lords frowned.

They don't really have access to the past, it's just like projecting the past, they can't affect what changes, and even the people of the past can't see their existence.

Moreover, they want to come out of the timeline, only from the future, so "163" will have to go back to the future timeline at that time.

"I agree, we don't know anything about the timeline, the future is full of changes, what if the future of the timeline is not harvested, and the past is what has happened, we can go to a place of great opportunity in the past, maybe we can gain something. However, we have to think about the iris, how long it can last, in case it doesn't come back, causing us to get lost in the timeline and can't get out, so we are completely annihilated in the timeline, then there is nothing to gain. Ye Tian said.

The Ice Lord estimated and said, "I estimated the energy of the Iris, and then calculated the consumption of going to the past, during this period of time, the biggest opportunity in the past was the birth of the Ancient Desolate Monument of Time and Space, but in the end, it was taken away by the Eternal Master. However, when the Ancient Monument of Time and Space was born, it still existed for some days, and we can go to that timeline repeatedly and comprehend the Ancient Monument of Time and Space again and again, and perhaps we can have a huge harvest. I once comprehended the Ancient Desolate Monument of Time and Space, but only once, and then I never had a chance again.

At this time, the Lord of the Shaking Mountain also said: "I have also heard of the Ancient Desolate Monument of Time and Space, among the Legendary Realm Lords who had comprehended the Ancient Desolate Monument of Time and Space, three of them broke through to the level of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, and many of them had a great increase in strength. However, at that time, except for those Legendary Realm Lords who went at the beginning, the later Legendary Realm Lords had no chance to enter at all, and they were all locked down. It was too long ago, and I hadn't become a Legendary Realm Lord yet, so I hadn't been there. "

The other Legendary Realm Lords hesitated for a moment, but they also agreed one after another, at least having an accurate target is better than not having a target to shuttle through the timeline.

Wow!!!

The Ice Lord controls the kite, reverses course, and begins to travel back and forth towards the past timeline.

Suddenly, pictures from the past appeared in the timeline.

Soon.

It consumed half of its energy and finally reached a location in the timeline that it had used to be.

"This is it!"

The Ice Lord said.

The next moment, Iris tore through the timeline and arrived at the past time and space.

In the past time and space, a void area.

"It's here!"

The Ice Lord said.

At this moment, they are still riding the kites, but whether they are the kites or them, they are in a very illusory special state.

Ye Tian also sensed that he was out of place in this time and space, this was the time and space in the past, and they came to this time and space in a special state at this moment.

He tried to attack.

Rumble!!!

The power is strong, but there is not a single ripple in the void area.

"Unable to affect the past plane.

Ye Tian completely understood what was going on, no matter how he attacked, he couldn't affect the past time and space, even if the Eternal Master could initially influence, it would not have much impact, at most it would leave a trace in the past time and space, and it would not affect anything.

They didn't have to wait long, and the Void began to change.

Bang!!!

An incomparably ancient stone monument emerged, which was the ancient desolate monument of time and space.

When the Empty Ancient Desolate Monument appeared, the space-time areas here began to distort, and even Ye Tian and them were almost affected.

"The Ancient Desolate Monument of Time and Space can actually affect the past and the future!"

Many Legendary Realm Lords were extremely surprised, but this also reflected the strength of the Ancient Desolate Monument of Time and Space.

Although they are in the past time and space, there is no problem in understanding the ancient desolate monuments of the past time and space.

The reason why the Eternal Masters are so powerful is because they can travel through the past and future time and space at will, and all the opportunities in the void area can be understood by them one by one........

Therefore, the strength of the Eternal Master is becoming more and more terrifying, far beyond the imagination of the peak Legendary Realm Lord.

"The other Legendary Realm Lords are here!"

The Ice Lord spoke.

He's talking about those Legendary Realm Lords from the past plane.

Soon, one by one, the Legendary Realm Lords arrived, and saw the Ancient Desolate Monument of Time and Space.

Suddenly, everyone saw a familiar figure.

Ice Lord!

This is the Ice Lord in the past time and space, and this Ice Lord is not a peak Legendary Realm Lord, but an ordinary Legendary Realm Lord.

At this time, the Ice River Lord explained: "When I comprehended the Ancient Desolate Monument of Time and Space, I really hadn't broken through yet, but I was about to break through, and it was not long after I comprehended the Ancient Desolate Monument of Time and Space that I broke through to the realm of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord. "

"I see!"

Everyone nodded secretly.

"Let's also enlighten, don't care about the legendary realm lords of the past time and space, time is limited, and the kite is also consuming energy points when he stays in the past time and space, and our time is very precious. The Ice Lord urged.

Immediately, one by one Legendary Realm Lords, including Ye Tian, were all enlightened.

Under the effect of the Ancient Desolate Monument of Time and Space, Ye Tian found that the obstacles to space in the underworld had disappeared, and he could comprehend the space normally, and he had obtained an unimaginable amplification effect.

In the past few years, Ye Tian has also collected and copied a lot of legendary-level space 0.9 ancestral endowments, but the number is not large and has not caused qualitative changes, but the speed of spatial comprehension is still far beyond that of other legendary realm lords.

I don't know how long it has been since I was enlightened, but everyone is still immersed in it.

Abrupt.

The Eternal Master has appeared.

In an instant, Ye Tian and the others were forced to suspend their enlightenment.

Rumble!!!!

An Eternal Controller who was difficult to see clearly appeared, and his appearance directly made many Legendary Realm Lords present seem to be frozen, and time and space were no longer controlled by them, but from the control of that Eternal Master.

"This thing is good, I want it!"

The Eternal Master grabbed the Ancient Desolate Monument of Time and Space with one hand.

But the next moment, another Eternal Master appeared. _
